hypothesis: A graph-based generative model pre-trained on ChEMBL35 and fine-tuned on the 103 CTF substrates and lattice nodes will generate lattice-node candidates that pass the experts' structural and electrochemical filters at a rate at least 15 percentage points higher than SMILES/SELFIES sequence-based models (e.g., REINVENT or Mol-AIR) under equivalent transfer-learning and computational-budget conditions.
